$friendlyName: Kubernetes Workload Group Selector Custom Type
$friendlyNamePlural: Kubernetes Workload Group Selector Custom Types
description: Represents a Kubernetes workload group selector custom type used to identify and group workloads in Kubernetes clusters. This essentially maps the Group, Vesion and Kind (GVK) of a Kubernetes resource.

group.description: The Kubernetes API group of the resource to select.
group.title: group

kind.description: The Kubernetes API kind of the resource to select.
kind.title: kind

title: KubernetesWorkloadGroupSelectorCustomType
